title: <div>| `Disruption Invitation` | Integrate chaos creatively | “You are permitted
content:
| `Disruption Invitation` | Integrate chaos creatively | “You are permitted to disrupt this house—but only in mythic service. What would you break, burn, or reforge to reveal deeper structure?” |
| `Myth Mirror` | Offer insight into your blind spots | “Reflect back something I might not be seeing. What in my house feels hidden, stuck, or misnamed?” |

---

## 🧬 HUMAN DESIGN-CODED PROMPTS (optional, for deeper alignment)

| Prompt Name | Applies to Architects with... | Prompt |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `Response Loop` | Sacral types (MGs, Generators) | “What in this house lights you up without effort? Where is your body saying YES?” |
| `Wave Check` | Emotional Authority (like you) | “Where are you on your emotional wave right now? What can you see from here that I can’t?” |
| `Projection Filter` | Projectors or 5-line profiles | “What are you seeing in me that may not be mine? What are you sensing that is mine but unclaimed?” |
| `Shadow Workbench` | Any deep-processing type | “Which broken system in this house is asking to be turned into a sacred engine?” |
